title: Criticism of Politician's Remarks on US Military Use of Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: Background on US Military Activities
sections.content: Prestwick Airport has a documented history of being used by the US military, a matter extensively covered by journalist Martyn McLaughlin.

sections.heading: Political Commentary
sections.content: McLaughlin critiques the First Minister's remarks, characterizing them as a form of political grandstanding rather than a sincere call for policy change.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – John Swinney's talk of potential US military ban at Prestwick is political grandstanding
